item.title: A message from Guidance:
item.description: Grade 12 students who still have community service hours to hand in, please do so as soon as possible. A miniumum of 40 community service hours are required in order to graduate. The deadline of for submission is May 19th and your 40 hours must be submitted in order to attend PROM.

item.title: A message from Prom Committee:
item.description: Got a sweet tooth? We’ve got you covered! Join us in the atrium during high school lunch this Thursday for our Cake Auction & Bake Sale — packed with homemade treats, cookies, cupcakes, and more! Bring your friends, bring some cash, and bid big — all proceeds go toward PROM!

item.title: A message from Mr. Cornellier.
item.description: Girls who are interested in trying out for the slo-pitch team are asked to sign their names on the sheet located just outside the gym doors. First tryout in on April 22nd.

item.title: A message from the Main Office:
A message from: Mrs. Longval:
item.description: Today is the LAST day to register a Volleyball Team in this week's Tournament. We appreciate the support in helping raise funds for our CrossFit Team. Please see Mrs. longval in the weight room at lunch to register yor team!

item.title: A message from Ms. Clouthier.
item.description: Please excuse the 7&8 boys basketball team at 8:25am.

item.title: A message from Ms. Montgomery:
item.description: Varsity Boys baseball tryout sign up will be posted today outside of Ms. Montgomery's office in the library. Stay tuned for tryout schedule. All students trying out will need to hand in their participation form PRIOR to the first tryout.
